title: penstemon luteus
intro: Penstemon luteus, also known as the yellow penstemon or yellow beardtongue, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Penstemon luteus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
